key_risks: Hawkish June FOMC if May CPI surprises hot, hitting growth/tech multiples
Momentum reversal in semis/AI after sharp 30d gains
Oil/commodity-driven inflation shock pressuring rates and risk assets
Geopolitical or earnings-guidance shock to defense/semis supply chains

portfolio.rationale: Strong momentum, Q1 chip sales +25% QoQ, AI capex set to rise 75% in 2026.
Gartner $2.59T AI spend forecast; strong momentum into FOMC.
Hedge against sticky 3.8% CPI, weak consumer sentiment 44.8, real-rate stable.
$1.5T FY27 defense budget tailwind; strong relative momentum.
AI cybersecurity spend nearly doubling YoY; +31% 30d momentum.

portfolio_rationale: Tilt toward AI/semis and defense momentum themes with strong fundamental catalysts, balanced by gold hedge against sticky inflation and weak consumer sentiment ahead of June FOMC.
rationale_summary: AI capex acceleration, semis cycle, and defense budget drive equity tilt; gold hedges inflation/sentiment risk into June FOMC.
